nodes.context: One of the most powerful Tongs in San Francisco's Chinatown during the early 20th century, involved in Tong wars and organized crime.
A Tong that allied with Suey Sing Tong against Bing Kong Tong, instigating a Tong war.
A Tong that allied with Hop Sing Tong against Bing Kong Tong, instigating a Tong war.

edges.evidence_quote: the Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs allied against the Bing Kong Tong
edges.context: Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs formed an alliance against Bing Kong Tong.

edges.evidence_quote: the Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs allied against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating one of the most violent Tong wars
edges.context: Hop Sing Tong was in conflict with Bing Kong Tong during a Tong war.

edges.evidence_quote: the Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs allied against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating one of the most violent Tong wars
edges.context: Suey Sing Tong was in conflict with Bing Kong Tong during a Tong war.
